title: Genetic Animals - Farmer's Delight Compat Datapack
description: This datapack creates more compat between Farmer's Delight (FD) and Genetic Animals (GA), allowing you to cook more mindlessly with fewer conversions.
body:
This datapack creates more compat between Farmer's Delight (FD) and Genetic Animals (GA), allowing you to cook more mindlessly with fewer conversions.

**For 1.18.2/1.20:**
- All GA chicken eggs can make FD fried eggs in the smoker and on the campfire.
- Big dark chicken meats and milk bottles have tags added to now work in more recipes.
- Big dark chicken meats can be cut on the cutting board.
- Big dark chicken meat can be used in the barbecue stick and roast chicken recipes.
- Unbound hay blocks can be used to make horse feed. 
- Added all cuts of GA chicken and rabbit to the dog food recipe.
- Genetic turtle eggs added to eggs category, now work in recipes that usually took vanilla turtle eggs.

![roast chicken recipes](https://i.imgur.com/mnrjFoS.gif)![dog food recipes](https://i.imgur.com/2R8Hgm7.gif)

These datapacks are uploaded for convenience sake for the Genetic Animals discord, though anyone is free to use them.

Since genetic animals do not use the traditional loot tables, adding ham to genetic pigs is not handled through these datapacks. It can instead be done using the In Control! mod. Scripts for this are also available on the Genetic Animals discord.
